---
title: "pre-crime_regressions"
author: "Joya Wheatfall-Melvin"
date: "2026-03-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
df8 <- civil_summons_2021_v8
```

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(MASS)       # glm.nb
library(AER)        # dispersiontest
library(sandwich)   # robust SEs
library(lmtest)     # coeftest
library(car)        # vif
library(broom)
```

```{r}
# Collapse to officer-level
df_officer <- df8 %>%
  group_by(Final_Officer_Tax_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    Officer_Total_Summonses       = max(Officer_Total_Summonses),
    roster_race                   = first(roster_race),
    roster_gender                 = first(roster_gender),
    roster_rank                   = first(roster_rank),
    roster_command                = first(roster_command),
    yrs_of_service                = first(yrs_of_service),
    Total.CCRB.complaints         = first(Total.CCRB.complaints),
    aa_total_arrests              = first(aa_total_arrests),
    total_award_count             = first(total_award_count),
    Reg.hours                     = first(Reg.hours),
    Overtime.hours                = first(Overtime.hours),
    total_calls                   = first(total_calls),
    BoroName                      = first(BoroName),
    month_issued                  = first(month_issued),
    respondent_race           = first(`respondent_race`),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}
# Relevel factors with correct baselines
df_officer <- df_officer %>%
  mutate(
    roster_race     = relevel(factor(roster_race),     ref = "WHITE"),
    roster_rank     = relevel(factor(roster_rank),     ref = "POLICE OFFICER"),
    roster_gender   = as.integer(roster_gender),       # 1=MALE, 0=NOT MALE
    BoroName        = relevel(factor(BoroName),        ref = "Manhattan"),
    month_issued    = factor(month_issued),
    respondent_race = relevel(factor(respondent_race), ref = "White")
  )
```

```{r}
#Verify distributions
cat("--- Officer Race ---\n");       print(table(df_officer$roster_race))
cat("\n--- Officer Rank ---\n");     print(table(df_officer$roster_rank))
cat("\n--- Officer Gender ---\n");   print(table(df_officer$roster_gender))
cat("\n--- Respondent Race ---\n");  print(table(df_officer$respondent_race))
cat("\n--- BoroName ---\n");  print(table(df_officer$BoroName))
cat("\n--- N officers ---\n");       print(nrow(df_officer))
```

```{r}
# Model 1 — Negative Binomial WITHOUT CRIME / GEO DATA 
# Controls: month only
model1_nb <- glm.nb(Officer_Total_Summonses ~
                      Total.CCRB.complaints +
                      aa_total_arrests +
                      roster_race +
                      roster_gender +
                      total_award_count +
                      roster_rank +
                      yrs_of_service +
                      Reg.hours +
                      Overtime.hours +
                      respondent_race +
                      month_issued,          # time control only
                    data = df_officer)

summary(model1_nb)
```


```{r}
# Model 1: Incidence rate ratios
tidy(model1_nb) %>%
  mutate(
    IRR      = round(exp(estimate), 3),
    CI_lower = round(exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error), 3),
    CI_upper = round(exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error), 3),
    p_value  = round(p.value, 4)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, IRR, CI_lower, CI_upper, p_value) %>%
  print(n = Inf)
```

```{r}
cat("\n--- VIF ---\n")
vif(model1_nb)
```

```{r}
# Model 2 — NB with geography (BoroName) and crime (total_calls) controls
model2_nb_geo_crime <- glm.nb(Officer_Total_Summonses ~
                                Total.CCRB.complaints +
                                aa_total_arrests +
                                roster_race +
                                roster_gender +
                                total_award_count +
                                roster_rank +
                                yrs_of_service +
                                Reg.hours +
                                Overtime.hours +
                                respondent_race +
                                total_calls +          # crime/workload control
                                BoroName +             # geography control
                                month_issued,          # time control
                              data = df_officer)

summary(model2_nb_geo_crime)
```


```{r}
# Model 2: Incidence rate ratios
tidy(model2_nb_geo_crime) %>%
  mutate(
    IRR      = round(exp(estimate), 3),
    CI_lower = round(exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error), 3),
    CI_upper = round(exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error), 3),
    p_value  = round(p.value, 4)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(term, IRR, CI_lower, CI_upper, p_value) %>%
  print(n = Inf)
```

```{r}
cat("\n--- VIF ---\n")
vif(model2_nb_geo_crime)
```

```{r}
# Compare all two models
cat("\n--- AIC Comparison ---\n")
AIC(model1_nb, model2_nb_geo_crime)
```

```{r}
install.packages("stargazer")
library(stargazer)

stargazer(model1_nb, model2_nb_geo_crime,
          type = "text",
          column.labels = c("Month Only", "Geo + Crime Controls"),
          digits = 3)
```

## EDA
```{r}
# Just want to see distribution of citations per month: month_issued12
df_officer %>%
  mutate(month_label = factor(month_issued,
                              levels = 1:12,
                              labels = c("Jan","Feb","Mar","Apr","May",
                                         "Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct",
                                         "Nov","Dec"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = month_label)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Summons by Month",
       x = "Month",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
#Gender distribution
ggplot(df_officer, aes(x = roster_gender)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Officer Gender Distribution",
       x = "Gender",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
# Officer Rank Distribution
# Ran
ggplot(df_officer, aes(x = roster_rank)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(title = "Officer Rank Distribution",
       x = "Rank",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```
